hero.title: Aẓeṭṭa
hero.lead: IATF ixeddem s wudem agejdan s umata. Tiɣawsiwin n usenfaṛ, ibeddlen n uḍebsi, ibeddel n udabu, d yiṣurdiyen n uxeddim ttwaḍefṛen deg imukan n tmetti. Asebter-a yeskan anda yettidir yal ṣṣenf n yizri d wamek ara t-nɣer.

items: Tiwtilin n usenfaṛ. Tiririt ɣef tuttriwin - ...tettwakkes-d s wudem n tiɣriwin deg usebter i d-yellan, yerna tettwafeggeṛ-d deg uḍebsi aɣelnaw. agemmayD acu-t ?

Suter isekkilen. Iḍebsiyen n usuter n umdan ttwaḥerzen deg unagraw n GitHub n IATF, deg usmel-a, neɣ deg sin. Isekkilen zemren ad d-smektiyen, ad sbedden, neɣ ad ssuqqlen asuter amezwaru akken ad yezmer uḥwaǧ n useḥbiber ad yettwaẓer mebla ma d-yessekcem isallen imdanen ur nelhi ara.
Yettbeddil uḍebsi. Yal abeddel n unamek d asebded agejdan deg usebded ay d-yeqqimen. Taggayt n GitHubD acu-t ?
Ibeddlen leḥkem. Tiɣawsiwin n usebter n udabu ttwaḍefent akken i d-ttunefken i Asebtar n IATF Aḍebsi. umezruy n usekcem deg GitHub.
Iṣurdiyen n uxeddim. IATF yeṭṭef isefka n uxeddim meẓẓiyen yerna yettarra-d isufka n lsas n twennaḍt taɣelnawt. Seg 2022, isefkan imeqqranen i d-yettuɣalen d ismawen n tnaḍin.
Tiɣriwin n usegmi. Tiɣriwin seg kra n tmuɣli neɣ tarrayt yettwaqqnen ttidiren deg GitHub Timlilit ɣef usentel-nni yemsefhamen ẓer Imeslayen ɣef Asebtar n IATF Aḍebsi.

paragraphs: IATF yeṭṭef tarakalt-is taɣelnawt d tamecṭuḥt. Seg useggas n 2022, isufar imeqranen i d-yettεawaden d ismawen n usaḍuf (domain).
Aḍebsi-ya mačči d unagraw n tedrimt yettwaḍebsen. D aɣmis n yiṣurdiyen n useqdec n twennaḍt i yettwaseqdacen akken ad teṭṭef IATF online.
operatingCosts.footnote: Tiɣawsiwin zemrent ad ttwaseklesent neɣ ad d-ssuffɣent deffir ma ttwaḥerzen. Tansawin n wemdan, isefka n uḥezzeb, d isallen n ukala ur nelli ara d aḥric seg uḍebsi aɣelnaw.

items.label: Tiɣriwin
items.value: Azal n usmel s ufus n mugiwarafx. Aḥezzeb s useqdec n twennaḍt tilellit neɣ n usefru s wazal-is amecṭuḥ s Cloudflare. iatf.cc taggayt.

items.label: Tiɣriwin
items.value: Azal n usmel s ufus n mugiwarafx. Aḥezzeb s useqdec n twennaḍt tilellit neɣ taḥerṣant s webrid n Vercel.

items.label: Tiɣriwin
items.value: Azal n usmel s ufus n mugiwarafx. Aḥezzeb s useqdec n twennaḍt tilellit neɣ taḥerṣant s usebter n GitHub Pages.

paragraphs: Kra n tɣawsiwin ur ttwaḥerzen ara deg yedlisen n tmetti s unamek:
items: Timsalin n umsawal n wid i d-yefkan asumer.
Tabrat tadelsant i yettwaseqdacen kan i usegzi n usuter uqbel ad yettwaqbel, ad yugi, neɣ ad d-yessegzu.
Tansa, uṭṭunen n tilifun d wayen ur neḥwaǧ ara.
Kra n tɣawsa ara d-yesseknen amseqdac n tesnilsit n tallalt mebla ma yefka-d lebɣi-s.
Timsawalin n Raw Discord, ala ma yella yiwen n izen yettwaḥerrek s lebɣi ɣer yiwen n usebter n usenfaṛ agejdan.

header.title: Lḥekma d adlis n yilugan i d-yezgan deffir yisenfaren-a.

paragraphs: Ma tebɣiḍ ad tfehmeḍ amek ttwaqeblen yisenfaren, amek ttwaḥerzen, neɣ amek ttwaseqdacen, ɣeṛ asebter n udabu.
